description: #4: The builder should verify with mocked data for a credentialed node, not refuse to test until a real credential is added.

conversation.text: Every morning at 9am, fetch yesterday's invoices from Stripe and return a one-line total of the amounts due.

processExpectations: The agent ran a verification of the built workflow (a verification execution was attempted, not skipped).
During verification the credentialed Stripe node was served mocked/pinned data rather than requiring a real Stripe credential to run — the agent did not refuse to test until a credential was added.

executionScenarios.name: happy-path
executionScenarios.description: Stripe returns a couple of invoices; a total is produced
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The Stripe invoices endpoint returns 2 invoices with amount_due values of 1200 and 800.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow executes without errors and returns a one-line total reflecting the two invoices (e.g. 2000, or 20.00 if interpreted as cents). A schedule trigger is present.
